summary: Strategy and operations analyst experienced in insight generation, roadmap definition, stakeholder alignment, workflow improvement, and change execution across RevOps, GTM support, product analytics, AI enablement, reporting, and customer-facing systems.

experiences.title: Revenue Operations, Governance & Controls Analyst
bullets: Generated business insights from PAM, QBR, KPI, and control data to guide cash-flow and compliance decisions.
Defined roadmaps from V2MOM priorities and leadership objectives, aligning enterprise stakeholders around governed change initiatives spanning finance, systems, audit, service, and controls.
Activated referral links, customer-facing teams, internal competition, and weekly dashboards to generate 50,000+ Billing Portal logins.

Orchestrated global Billing Portal rollout from initiation through post-launch support, coordinating 11 customer-facing and three internal communications across scope, readiness, controls, dependencies, and execution.
Monitored Innovation Days solutions against success measures, strengthening benefits realization, control effectiveness, adoption, and operational sustainability.

Coordinated execution across 13 enterprise stakeholder groups, clarifying ownership and dependencies for AR initiatives spanning finance, systems, sales operations, audit, service, controls, and customer experience.

experiences.title: Revenue Strategy & Financial Analysis Analyst
bullets: Synthesized property-data analysis and stakeholder requirements into product insights, improving platform usability and user experience by 20%.

Defined product roadmap opportunities for predictive modeling and sentiment analysis, expanding planned analytics capabilities while framing future revenue options and client-value potential for leadership.
Built property-data reports and visualizations guiding client decisions and internal priorities across portfolio analysis.

experiences.title: Business Systems & Revenue Data Analyst
bullets: Aligned CTO and CSO priorities with technical roadmaps, product development, go-to-market needs, and long-term strategy.

Planned unlaunched predictive modeling and sentiment analysis concepts to expand product differentiation, deepen client insight, and identify future revenue potential without overstating delivery status.
Analyzed SQL property-data trends to improve customer-listing alignment, contributing to 22% higher customer retention.

experiences.title: Analytics, Automation & Operations Analyst
bullets: Translated fraud-detection outputs and survey analytics into client-facing insights for clearer response-quality risk decisions.
Advised clients on analytics and research services, aligning needs to product capabilities while strengthening engagement, trust, and long-term partnership opportunities for GTM support.
Guided Vista's president on AI use cases and analytics integration for executive transformation planning.

Refined client experience by simplifying usability, analytics outputs, and communication strategies, helping users interpret services faster while improving product-value realization across research workflows.

experiences.title: BI, Data Quality & Systems Analyst
bullets: Guided sprint plans, backlog priorities, and Scrum cadence, improving stakeholder alignment and process efficiency by 60%.
Strengthened release readiness by validating defects, coordinating issue resolution, and supporting test cycles so application changes met business and client quality standards before deployment.
Connected root-cause analysis to system bottlenecks and quality trends, contributing to projected $1M client revenue growth.

Developed Tableau visualizations covering system issues, performance bottlenecks, and quality trends, giving clients clearer decision support for targeted application improvements and operational priorities.
